title: TeleportHome
description: Adds configurable commands for teleporting to spawn or one of your homes.
body:
-Use command /setSpawn to select global spawn, then use /spawn to teleport to it.

/spawn can be used by everyone, /setSpawn can be used only with admin rights.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea009f0a209107b92e5334442e152ef207236d62.png)

-Use command /setHome <name> to create your home point.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fe037c9cd7ee2e4f00223c3ee0847fc90f5fc92.png)

You can teleport to your home by /home <name>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd0ef7a5e25b490375bdd08538d19f8678088670.png)

This command can be used by everyone and homes are individual.
You can have only certain amount of homes that specified in the config.

If you at the limit of your homes, you can remove one of your homes to create a space for new one.

You can see all your homes with /homes

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbfba5062b30e1b91e585ae1d4136fb7030d9242.png)

You can remove home with /removehome <name>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b3f155df6477d85352fd855961d1d7a69a5eaa5.png)

You can only remove homes that you own.

Homes are stored in the world's config saves/saveName/serverconfig/tp-server.toml
